name: nixbuild.net
description: Nix builds as a service — submit Nix derivations, get them built remotely with shared cache across all users. Generous free tier (25 CPU-hours/month). Bearer-token authenticated; the API also supports OIDC for short-lived CI tokens. Useful when your build is Nix-shaped (Nixpacks, NixOS, dev shells) — not for arbitrary Dockerfile builds.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Auth Token
credential_fields.description: Generate via the nixbuild.net shell with `nixbuild.net token create --build-read --build-write --store-read --store-write`

tools.name: list_builds
tools.description: List builds. Args: created_gte? (ISO8601), created_lt? (ISO8601), status? (comma-separated: queued,running,succeeded,failed,canceled), derivations? (CSV of .drv paths), limit? (default 500).

tools.name: get_build
tools.description: Get a build by id including timings and store paths produced. Args: build_id.

tools.name: cancel_build
tools.description: Cancel a queued or running build. Args: build_id.

tools.name: list_tokens
tools.description: List auth tokens for the account.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get account info including remaining free CPU-hours and current spend.
